text: Epstein scheduled dinner with Bill Gates, Larry Summers, and Jes Staley plus Vogue party at Boom Boom Room, April 28, 2011

location: Little St. James Island, U.S. Virgin Islands
text: Lawrence Krauss flew from Phoenix to Epstein's island property in June 2012 where Epstein was expected to be present
Casey Johnson worked for Epstein in USVI for five years, resigning June 2012 citing inability to afford daughter's education costs
Witness places Epstein and Maxwell at cabin on Queen's Balmoral estate with Prince Andrew, circa 1999
Prince Andrew attended party in Woking with daughter Beatrice, March 2001 — documented in Epstein correspondence
